# [Project Name]

> One-line description of what this project does and who it's for.

## Quick Start

### Prerequisites

- Node.js >= 20
- npm
- [Other tools]

### Setup

```bash
git clone [repo-url]
cd [project-name]
cp .env.example .env
# Fill in env values — see .env.example for descriptions
npm install
npm run dev
```

### Commands

| Command | Description |
|---------|-------------|
| `npm run dev` | Start development server |
| `npm run build` | Production build |
| `npm run test` | Run test suite |
| `npm run lint` | Lint + format check |

## Tech Stack

- Frontend: [e.g., Next.js 15 + React 19 + Tailwind CSS 4]
- Backend: [e.g., NestJS + PostgreSQL]
- Auth: [e.g., Supabase Auth / Keycloak]

## Project Structure

```
src/
  components/   — UI components
  pages/        — Route pages
  lib/          — Utilities, API clients
  hooks/        — Custom React hooks
  data/         — Static data, mocks
docs/           — Project documentation
public/         — Static assets
```
